Project Understanding

Requirements Overview

SIBL SECURITIES LIMITED. requires a modern corporate website that strengthens its digital presence, improves investor communication and keeps important brokerage information accessible across devices.

Business Goals

  • Strengthen the corporate brand with a credible digital presence.
  • Improve investor communication through clear website content.
  • Publish research reports, publications, news and circulars.
  • Improve accessibility for clients, investors and visitors.
  • Deliver a responsive mobile experience for all major devices.
  • Enable easy CMS updates by authorized website administrators.
  • Improve search visibility through SEO optimization.

Delivery Principles

  • Responsive design for desktop, tablet and mobile visitors.
  • Performance-focused implementation for fast page loading.
  • Security-conscious CMS configuration and access control.
  • Accessible page structure for readable, user-friendly content.
  • Modern CMS experience for routine content maintenance.
  • Future scalability for additional brokerage website sections.
Scope of Work

Corporate Website

The website will provide a professional public-facing identity for SIBL SECURITIES LIMITED., designed around brokerage services, investor information, publications and client communication.

01

Corporate Pages

Home, About Company, Board of Directors and Management Team pages.

02

Products & Services

BO Account, Trading Services, Research and Merchant Banking information.

03

Information Portal

News, circulars, downloads, publications and important investor resources.

04

Contact

Contact information, branch locations, Google Maps and inquiry form.

Website Administration

Content Management System

The CMS will help authorized website administrators manage regular updates, publications and media without depending on code-level changes.

Module Included Capability
News Management Create, update and publish company news and announcements.
Publications Management Manage research reports, market updates and other downloadable publications.
Banner Management Update homepage banners and key promotional website content.
Downloads Upload and organize forms, documents, circulars and client resources.
User Management Manage authorized CMS users and content publishing access.
Media Library Store and reuse images, documents and website media assets.
Homepage Editor Update selected homepage sections for timely investor communication.
Website Capabilities

Website Features

The proposed website will combine a professional brokerage-facing interface with practical features for investor communication, document access and ongoing content management.

01

Responsive Design

Optimized browsing experience across desktop, tablet and mobile devices.

02

SEO Ready

Search-friendly page structure, metadata and content organization.

03

Secure CMS

Protected administrative access for authorized website administrators.

04

Document Downloads

Structured access to forms, circulars, documents and investor resources.

05

Research Publications

Dedicated publishing section for market research and publications.

06

Branch Locator

Branch information with map-ready location presentation.

07

Contact Forms

Inquiry forms for visitor communication and service requests.

08

Performance Optimization

Optimized front-end delivery for faster loading and better usability.

Technical Proposal

Technology & Quality Standards

The solution will be implemented using modern, maintainable web technologies selected for reliability, security, performance and long-term website maintainability.

Technical Standards

  • Responsive and accessible front-end implementation.
  • Secure CMS architecture for website administrators.
  • Structured content database for pages, media, downloads and publications.
  • SEO optimization for corporate pages and published content.
  • SSL-ready deployment with security-conscious configuration.
  • Performance optimization for fast page loading.

Handover Package

  • Production website deployment.
  • CMS access credentials for authorized representatives.
  • Source code and essential setup documentation.
  • Training or walkthrough session after delivery.
Delivery Plan

Timeline

Estimated delivery duration: 15 Working Days from requirement confirmation, content availability and formal approval to proceed.

Phase 01

Discovery & Planning

Requirement confirmation, content review, website structure planning and implementation schedule.

Phase 02

Design & Development

Website UI development, responsive front-end implementation, CMS development and content module setup.

Phase 03

Review & Refinement

Client feedback, content correction, browser testing and launch preparation.

Phase 04

Deployment & Handover

Production deployment, final verification, CMS walkthrough and handover materials.

FINANCIAL PROPOSAL

Commercial Investment

The proposed fixed investment for the complete corporate website development and deployment is shown below.

Description Amount
Corporate website UI/UX design Included
Responsive website development Included
CMS / Content Management Included
Company profile & management pages Included
Products & services pages Included
News & announcements module Included
Research & publications section Included
Downloads / Forms & Documents Included
Career / Recruitment page Included
Contact & branch locations Included
SEO optimization Included
Security hardening & SSL configuration Included
Deployment & production setup Included
Administrator training Included
One-year technical support Included
Total Project Investment 70,000 BDT
Commercial Notes
  • Fixed-price implementation.
  • No hidden charges.
  • One year technical support included.
  • Domain and hosting excluded unless separately specified.
Support & Terms

Support, Assumptions & Validity

Post-Launch Support

  • Basic bug fixing support after handover for issues within the agreed website scope.
  • Operational guidance for website administrators during the initial adoption period.
  • Future feature enhancement available through separate quotation.

Client Responsibilities

  • Provide company content, images, branding materials and approval feedback on time.
  • Provide hosting or server access if deployment is required on client infrastructure.
  • Nominate responsible reviewers for acceptance and CMS handover.

Proposal Validity

This proposal is prepared for SIBL SECURITIES LIMITED. and remains valid for 30 days from July 2026 unless otherwise extended by GOTIHUB.
